failureReasons.description: No indication found of being logged in.

afEnv:
env:
  contexts:
  - name: deptex-dast
    urls:
    - http://host.docker.internal:8080
    includePaths:
    - http://host.docker.internal:8080.*
    - http://host\.docker\.internal:8080.*
    authentication:
      method: browser
      parameters:
        loginPageUrl: http://host.docker.internal:8080/login
        loginPageWait: 5
        browserId: firefox-headless
        stepDelay: 0
        diagnostics: false
        steps:
        - description: type username
          type: USERNAME
          cssSelector: "#email"
          value: alice@example.com
          timeout: 1000
        - description: type password
          type: PASSWORD
          cssSelector: "#pass"
          value: hunter2hunter2
          timeout: 1000
        - description: click submit
          type: CLICK
          cssSelector: "button[type=submit]"
          timeout: 1000
      verification:
        method: response
        loggedInRegex: "Welcome, alice"
        loggedOutRegex: Sign in
        pollFrequency: 60
        pollUnits: seconds
    sessionManagement:
      method: cookie
    technology: {}
    structure: {}
    users:
    - name: deptex-dast-user
      credentials:
        password: hunter2hunter2
        username: alice@example.com
  parameters: {}
logFile:
